blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
